---
title: "Rāg Āḍānā"
subtitle: "*Beṇī nirakhata bhujaṅga*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Kṣemarasik &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Cautāl (Drut)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> beṇī nirakhata bhujaṅga patāla loka gayo,  
> dṛga dekhata mīna jala madha chipata rī

**Antarā**

> mukha dekha kalā hīna uḍapata uḍa vyoma basata  
> hasata daśana dūta nirakhata hata anāra darakha marori

**Sanchārī**

> kuca dekha cakravāka nagara na rahe yaha kāraṇa  
> tana duti dekha kāñcana āgame jarorī

**Ābhog**

> siṃha bākī kaṭi nehāra gayo vana para darapa hāra,  
> kṣemarasika chaba nirakhata deta balihārī

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Cautāl is a 12-beat cycle divided as **2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **O**, **2**, **O**, **3**, **4**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the twelve columns correspond to beats 1–12, with sam **X** at beat 1, **O** (khālī) at beat 3, **2** at beat 5, **O** (khālī) at beat 7, **3** at beat 9, and **4** at beat 11. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| N | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\lb{nd}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | N |
| **be** | **-** | **ṇī** | **-** | **ni** | **ra** | **kha** | **ta** | **bhu** | **ja** | **-** | **ṅga** |
| N | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{nd}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | P |
| **be** | **-** | **-** | **ṇī** | **ni** | **ra** | **kha** | **ta** | **bhu** | **ja** | **-** | **ṅga** |
| m | m | P | P | $\lb{\sps{P}\tr{S}}$ | - | N | P | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | - | m | P |
| **pa** | **tā** | **-** | **la** | **lo** | **-** | **ka** | **ga** | **yo** | **-** | **dṛ** | **ga** |
| $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | - | n | P | - | P | - | P | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | m | P |
| **de** | **-** | **kha** | **ta** | **-** | **mī** | **-** | **na** | **ja** | **la** | **ma** | **dha** |
| m | P | n | n | P | m | g | g | m | m | R | S |
| **chi** | **pa** | **ta** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **rī** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| m | P | $\lb{nP}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{R}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ |
| **mu** | **kha** | **-** | **de** | **-** | **kha** | **ka** | **lā** | **-** | **hī** | **-** | **na** |
| $\lb{\sps{\tr{S}}N}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{S}}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{R}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | P |
| **u** | **ḍa** | **pa** | **ta** | **u** | **ḍa** | **vyo** | **-** | **ma** | **ba** | **sa** | **ta** |
| m | P | $\lb{nP}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{R}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ |
| **mu** | **kha** | **-** | **de** | **-** | **kha** | **ka** | **lā** | **-** | **hī** | **-** | **na** |
| $\lb{\sps{\tr{S}}N}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{S}}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{R}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | P |
| **u** | **ḍa** | **pa** | **ta** | **u** | **ḍa** | **byo** | **-** | **ma** | **ba** | **sa** | **ta** |
| m | P | P | $\lb{\sps{\tr{m}}\tr{g}}$ | $\tr{g}$ | $\tr{g}$ | $\lb{\tr{g}\tr{m}}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **ha** | **sa** | **ta** | **da** | **śa** | **na** | **dū** | **ta** | **ni** | **ra** | **kha** | **ta** |
| m | m | m | P | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | $\lb{mP}$ | R | R | S |
| **ha** | **ta** | **a** | **nā** | **-** | **ra** | **da** | **ra** | **kha** | **ma** | **ro** | **ri** |

:::

## Sanchārī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| m | m | - | m | - | m | P | - | P | n | P | P |
| **ku** | **ca** | **-** | **de** | **-** | **kha** | **ca** | **-** | **kra** | **vā** | **-** | **ka** |
| m | P | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | n | P |
| **na** | **ga** | **ra** | **na** | **ra** | **he** | **ya** | **ha** | **kā** | **-** | **ra** | **ṇa** |
| m | m | - | m | - | m | P | - | P | n | P | P |
| **ku** | **ca** | **-** | **de** | **-** | **kha** | **ca** | **-** | **kra** | **vā** | **-** | **ka** |
| m | P | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | n | P |
| **na** | **ga** | **ra** | **na** | **ra** | **he** | **ya** | **ha** | **kā** | **-** | **ra** | **ṇa** |
| $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | m | P | $\lb{\sps{P}n}$ | P | m | g | m | R | - | S |
| **ta** | **na** | **du** | **ti** | **de** | **kha** | **kā** | **-** | **-** | **ñca** | **-** | **na** |
| S | m | m | m | P | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | - | $\lb{nd}$ | n | P |
| **ā** | **-** | **ga** | **me** | **ja** | **-** | **ro** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **rī** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| m | P | P | $\lb{nd}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | N | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ |
| **siṃ** | **-** | **ha** | **bā** | **-** | **kī** | **ka** | **ṭi** | **ne** | **hā** | **-** | **ra** |
| $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{m}}\tr{g}}$ | $\tr{g}$ | $\tr{m}$ | $\tr{R}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ |
| **ga** | **yo** | **va** | **na** | **pa** | **ra** | **da** | **ra** | **pa** | **hā** | **-** | **ra** |
| m | P | P | $\lb{nd}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | N | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ |
| **siṃ** | **-** | **ha** | **vā** | **-** | **kī** | **ka** | **ṭi** | **ne** | **hā** | **-** | **ra** |
| $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{m}}\tr{g}}$ | $\tr{g}$ | $\tr{m}$ | $\tr{R}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ |
| **ga** | **yo** | **va** | **na** | **pa** | **ra** | **da** | **ra** | **pa** | **hā** | **-** | **ra** |
| $\lb{\sps{P}n}$ | $\lb{mP}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{m}}\tr{g}}$ | $\tr{g}$ | $\lb{\tr{g}\tr{m}}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **kṣe** | **-** | **ma** | **ra** | **si** | **ka** | **cha** | **ba** | **ni** | **ra** | **kha** | **ta** |
| $\lb{\tr{S}\tr{R}}$ | N | N | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | $\lb{nm}$ | P |
| **de** | **-** | **ta ba** | **-** | **li** | **-** | **hā** | **-** | **-** | **rī** | **-** | **-** |

:::
